description: Extend the page DocumentId authorization contract and adapter so GET-many can carry executable People relationship subjects from RelationshipAuthorizationResult.Authorized without losing configured strategy identity, relationship-local ordering, auth-object metadata, person DocumentId path metadata, or skipped contributor diagnostics.
acceptance-criteria: PageDocumentIdAuthorizationSpec can represent EdOrg subjects and People subjects in the same relationship strategy.
PageDocumentIdAuthorizationSpecAdapter adapts stored People check specs for all five People relationship strategies instead of throwing the temporary GET-many People staging exception.
The adapter preserves RawConfiguredIndex, RelationshipLocalOrder, subject AND ordering, strategy OR ordering, person auth view table, person DocumentId output column, and root/stored path metadata.
Single-record GET-by-id, POST, PUT, and DELETE People relationship execution remains staged as not implemented for DMS-1158.
steps-to-verify: Review src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans/PageDocumentIdQueryModels.cs and PageDocumentIdAuthorizationSpecAdapter.cs for a model that distinguishes EdOrg and People page subjects.

Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PageDocumentIdAuthorizationSpecAdapter"

Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RelationshipAuthorizationEndpointExecutionBoundary"

description: Generalize PageDocumentIdSqlCompiler authorization emission so EdOrg and People page authorization subjects are emitted from auth-object metadata rather than the current EdOrg-only strategy-kind switch.
acceptance-criteria: Existing EdOrg-only GET-many SQL remains unchanged for normal and inverted strategies, including direct claim match plus hierarchy lookup.
Authorization subjects inside one configured relationship strategy are combined with AND.
Configured relationship strategies, including duplicate strategy entries, are combined with OR and preserve configured order metadata.
Page and total-count SQL use the same authorization predicate shape.
People-involved strategies that include EducationOrganization subjects preserve the DMS-1055 concrete root-table EdOrg subject scope and direct-claim-plus-hierarchy behavior.
People GET-many authorization does not introduce generated SQL caching; it uses the existing per-plan SQL generation and runtime parameterization pipeline.
steps-to-verify: Review src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans/PageDocumentIdSqlCompiler.cs authorization emission for data-driven auth-object handling.
Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PageDocumentIdSqlCompiler"
Compare existing EdOrg-only SQL expectations in src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/PageDocumentIdSqlCompilerTests.cs against the generated page and total-count SQL.

description: Implement GET-many SQL emission for People self and direct root-column subjects using the required root DocumentId IN subquery shape against the selected People auth view.
acceptance-criteria: Student, Contact, and Staff direct root-column subjects emit root DocumentId IN subqueries instead of JOINing auth views into the outer page query.
Student, Contact, and Staff self subjects use the zero-hop root DocumentId binding and never use UniqueId or USI values for authorization.

People auth view predicates use the auth view table name, SourceEducationOrganizationId claim column, and Student_DocumentId, Contact_DocumentId, or Staff_DocumentId output column carried by the shared People core.
The same People predicate is emitted for page SQL and total-count SQL.
steps-to-verify: Add or update PageDocumentIdSqlCompilerTests cases for Student self, direct Student reference, direct Contact reference, and direct Staff reference.
Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PageDocumentIdSqlCompiler"
Inspect generated SQL assertions for the root DocumentId IN (SELECT r2.DocumentId FROM ...) shape and absence of UniqueId or USI authorization joins.

description: Implement GET-many SQL emission for transitive People subjects by walking the shared DocumentId path metadata from the root table through intermediate tables to the terminal person DocumentId column.
acceptance-criteria: Transitive Student, Contact, and Staff subjects emit a root DocumentId IN subquery anchored at a second root alias and joined through the ordered path supplied by RelationshipAuthorizationPersonSubjectMetadata.
A CourseTranscript to StudentAcademicRecord to Student subject emits the canonical root DocumentId IN shape described by DMS-1095.
Broken or null stored transitive path values naturally filter out as nonmatching rows for GET-many and do not create per-row invalid-data failures.
Table aliases are deterministic and do not collide with outer query, descriptor, document, or sibling authorization aliases.
steps-to-verify: Add or update PageDocumentIdSqlCompilerTests for CourseTranscript -> StudentAcademicRecord -> Student and at least one transitive Contact or Staff path if available in fixtures.
Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PageDocumentIdSqlCompiler"
Review generated PostgreSQL and SQL Server SQL snippets for ordered intermediate JOIN clauses inside the root DocumentId IN subquery.

description: Wire People relationship GET-many execution through RelationalDocumentStoreRepository by removing the query-only People staging failure while preserving staging for People GET-by-id, POST, PUT, and DELETE.
acceptance-criteria: GET-many requests configured with People relationship strategies reach page keyset planning instead of returning the temporary 501 People staging response.
People relationship strategies are added to the relationship OR group when mixed with EdOrg-only relationship strategies.
Any non-relationship GET-many strategy already implemented in the relational path composes with the relationship OR group using final auth.md AND semantics.
Known non-relationship strategies that are not yet implemented for GET-many still return the existing 501 staging response when combined with People relationship strategies.
Unknown or invalid strategy metadata continues to use the security-configuration failure path.
GET-by-id, POST, PUT, and DELETE behavior for People relationship strategies remains deferred to DMS-1158.
steps-to-verify: Review TryCreatePeopleEndpointStagingFailures usage in src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend/RelationalDocumentStoreRepository.cs.
Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RelationalDocumentStoreRepository"
Run a targeted repository unit test proving GET-many no longer returns QueryFailureNotImplemented for RelationshipsWithStudentsOnly while GET-by-id still stages People CRUD execution.

description: Enforce DMS-1095 planning and short-circuit order for People relationship GET-many: classify strategies, resolve People subjects, validate selected auth views, then short-circuit empty EdOrg claims only for a valid supported plan.
acceptance-criteria: Unresolved operation-applicable People subjects return a security-configuration failure before empty-claim short-circuiting.
Selected People subjects that require missing auth views return a security-configuration failure before empty-claim short-circuiting.
Missing People auth views do not fail a mixed EdOrg-and-People strategy when no executable People subjects are selected and applicable EdOrg subjects remain.

Mixed EdOrg-and-People strategies continue when ODS subject-scope filtering leaves at least one executable EdOrg or People subject, and fail as a security-configuration error only when no executable subjects remain.
A valid supported People relationship plan with no ClaimEducationOrganizationIds returns a 200 empty page and totalCount 0 when requested without composing or executing People auth-view SQL.
steps-to-verify: Review RelationshipAuthorizationPlanner.PlanStoredValues behavior for SecurityConfigurationError, NoClaims, and missing People auth view failures.

Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RelationshipAuthorizationPlanner"
Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RelationalDocumentStoreRepositoryTests"

description: Ensure People relationship GET-many uses the DMS-1055 ClaimEducationOrganizationIds parameterization contract consistently for PostgreSQL arrays, SQL Server expanded scalar parameters below 2,000 unique IDs, and SQL Server dms.BigIntTable TVPs at 2,000 or more unique IDs.
acceptance-criteria: People auth-view predicates use the same ClaimEducationOrganizationIds parameterization helper as EdOrg relationship predicates.
PostgreSQL People predicates use = ANY(@ClaimEducationOrganizationIds).
SQL Server People predicates use expanded scalar parameters for 1,999 unique IDs and dms.BigIntTable for 2,000 unique IDs.
Deduplication and ascending sort occur before SQL Server threshold selection.
Page and total-count parameter metadata include the required authorization parameters exactly once per query plan.
steps-to-verify: Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~AuthorizationClaimEducationOrganizationIdParameterizationFactory"
Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PageDocumentIdSqlCompiler"
Review PageDocumentIdSqlCompilerTests assertions for PostgreSQL array, SQL Server scalar, and SQL Server structured People auth-view SQL.

description: Add focused adapter and planner unit coverage for all five People relationship strategies and their GET-many-specific execution boundaries.
acceptance-criteria: Unit tests cover RelationshipsWithEdOrgsAndPeople, RelationshipsWithEdOrgsAndPeopleInverted, RelationshipsWithPeopleOnly, RelationshipsWithStudentsOnly, and RelationshipsWithStudentsOnlyThroughResponsibility in stored GET-many planning.
Tests prove through-responsibility Student subjects select auth.EducationOrganizationIdToStudentDocumentIdThroughResponsibility and Student_DocumentId.
Tests prove RelationshipsWithEdOrgsAndPeopleInverted only inverts the EdOrg hierarchy subject and leaves People auth-view direction unchanged.
Tests prove child-collection People paths are skipped as ineligible and retained in diagnostics.
Tests prove missing People auth views and no-applicable-subject selections surface security-configuration failures.
steps-to-verify: Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RelationshipAuthorizationPlanner|FullyQualifiedName~RelationalPeopleAuthorizationSubjectSelector|FullyQualifiedName~PageDocumentIdAuthorizationSpecAdapter"
Review new test names for Given_ fixture style and It_ test method prefixes.
Confirm no test relies on People GET-by-id, POST, PUT, or DELETE execution.

description: Add focused SQL compiler unit coverage for DMS-1095 People GET-many page and total-count predicates across direct, self, transitive, mixed, and duplicate-avoidance cases.
acceptance-criteria: Tests cover Student self resource, direct Student reference, transitive Student path, direct Contact reference, direct Staff reference, and StudentsOnlyThroughResponsibility.
Tests prove mixed EdOrg-and-People strategy subjects are ANDed within one strategy.
Tests prove EdOrg-only and People-involved relationship strategies are ORed as distinct branches.
Tests prove the SQL uses root DocumentId IN subqueries and does not introduce outer joins that can duplicate root documents.
Tests prove authorization filtering appears before paging and is also present in total-count SQL.
steps-to-verify: Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PageDocumentIdSqlCompiler"
Inspect SQL expectations for both PostgreSQL and SQL Server variants.
Confirm test fixtures include page SQL and total-count SQL assertions for every People predicate shape.

description: Add repository-level unit coverage for DMS-1095 GET-many runtime composition and failure surfaces.
acceptance-criteria: Tests prove GET-many with a People relationship strategy executes page planning instead of returning the old 501 staging response.
Tests prove NoFurtherAuthorizationRequired remains a no-op when combined with People relationship strategies.
Tests prove any non-relationship GET-many strategy already implemented in the relational path is ANDed with the relationship strategy OR group.
Tests prove known unsupported NamespaceBased, OwnershipBased, and valid custom view-based strategies still return 501 when not yet implemented and mixed with People relationship strategies.
Tests prove invalid custom view metadata and unknown strategy names return security-configuration failures rather than 501.
Tests prove security-configuration failures use the canonical urn:ed-fi:api:system:configuration:security ProblemDetails type, title, status, and detail.
Tests prove empty EdOrg claims for a valid People plan return an empty QuerySuccess with totalCount 0 when requested.
steps-to-verify: Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RelationalDocumentStoreRepositoryTests"
Review the tests around QueryFailureNotImplemented and TryCreatePeopleEndpointStagingFailures for GET-many versus single-record operations.
Confirm QuerySuccess empty-page assertions cover both totalCount=true and totalCount=false behavior.

description: Add PostgreSQL and SQL Server API-level integration coverage for Student-oriented People relationship GET-many filtering using real relational persistence and emitted People auth views.
acceptance-criteria: Integration tests cover authorized and unauthorized GET-many results for Student self or direct Student subjects.
Integration tests cover RelationshipsWithStudentsOnlyThroughResponsibility using auth.EducationOrganizationIdToStudentDocumentIdThroughResponsibility.
Integration tests cover a transitive Student path such as CourseTranscript -> StudentAcademicRecord -> Student.
Integration tests prove null or broken stored transitive paths are filtered out as nonmatches without per-row invalid-data failures.
Tests run for both PostgreSQL and SQL Server where local admin connection strings are configured.
Tests do not require People-involved GET-by-id, POST, PUT, or DELETE authorization execution.
steps-to-verify: Run dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter "Category=PostgresqlIntegration&FullyQualifiedName~Relationship"

Run ConnectionStrings__MssqlAdmin='<admin connection string>' dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter "Category=MssqlIntegration&FullyQualifiedName~Relationship"
Review integration test setup to ensure seeded data uses backend setup helpers or direct database writes rather than People CRUD authorization paths.

description: Add PostgreSQL and SQL Server API-level integration coverage for Contact and Staff People relationship GET-many filtering using real relational persistence and emitted People auth views.
acceptance-criteria: Integration tests cover authorized and unauthorized Contact GET-many results using auth.EducationOrganizationIdToContactDocumentId and Contact_DocumentId.
Integration tests cover authorized and unauthorized Staff GET-many results using auth.EducationOrganizationIdToStaffDocumentId and Staff_DocumentId.
Staff coverage includes relationship visibility through staff education organization assignment or employment associations.
Tests run for both PostgreSQL and SQL Server where local admin connection strings are configured.
Tests do not require People-involved GET-by-id, POST, PUT, or DELETE authorization execution.
steps-to-verify: Run dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter "Category=PostgresqlIntegration&FullyQualifiedName~Relationship"

Run ConnectionStrings__MssqlAdmin='<admin connection string>' dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter "Category=MssqlIntegration&FullyQualifiedName~Relationship"
Review integration test setup to ensure seeded Contact and Staff data uses backend setup helpers or direct database writes rather than People CRUD authorization paths.

description: Add integration coverage for People relationship GET-many composition, pagination, totalCount, and SQL Server authorization-parameter thresholds.
acceptance-criteria: Tests prove RelationshipsWithEdOrgsAndPeople ANDs EdOrg and People subjects within one strategy, including EdOrg-pass/People-fail and People-pass/EdOrg-fail cases.
Tests prove EdOrg-only and People-involved relationship strategies are ORed and do not return duplicate root documents.
Tests prove authorization filtering occurs before offset/limit paging and before totalCount calculation.
Tests prove SQL Server uses expanded scalar parameters for 1,999 unique claim EdOrg IDs and dms.BigIntTable for 2,000 unique claim EdOrg IDs in an executed GET-many path.
Tests prove duplicate claim EdOrg IDs are deduped before threshold selection.
steps-to-verify: Run dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Relationship"

Run ConnectionStrings__MssqlAdmin='<admin connection string>' dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter "Category=MssqlIntegration&FullyQualifiedName~Relationship"
Inspect captured SQL or query parameter metadata assertions for SQL Server scalar and TVP branches.

description: Retag the existing GET-many-only People relationship E2E scenarios required by DMS-1095 for relational backend execution without enabling scenarios that depend on People CRUD authorization.
acceptance-criteria: RelationshipsWithEdOrgsAndPeople.feature scenarios 05, 14, 46, 47, and 54 have @relational-backend and an appropriate @relational-ci-shard-* tag.
RelationshipsWithEdOrgsAndStaffs.feature scenarios 04, 11, 16, and 23 have @relational-backend and an appropriate @relational-ci-shard-* tag.
People scenarios whose setup or assertion exercises People GET-by-id, POST, PUT, DELETE, mutation cascade, or the DMS-1158 deferred scenario list remain untagged for relational backend.
Retagged scenarios can run against the relational DMS E2E stack without depending on People CRUD authorization.
steps-to-verify: Review src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E/Features/Authorization/RelationshipsWithEdOrgsAndPeople.feature for scenarios 05, 14, 46, 47, and 54.
Review src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E/Features/Authorization/RelationshipsWithEdOrgsAndStaffs.feature for scenarios 04, 11, 16, and 23.

Run env -u NODE_OPTIONS dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E.csproj --configuration Release --filter "Category=relational-backend" after starting the relational E2E stack.

description: Add focused relational E2E scenarios for DMS-1095 People GET-many gaps that are not covered by safe retagging, especially empty EdOrg claims and through-responsibility Student GET-many.
acceptance-criteria: A focused Student GET-many E2E scenario verifies real token and claim-set wiring for a People relationship strategy.
A focused Staff GET-many E2E scenario verifies real token and claim-set wiring for staff assignment or employment relationships.
A focused empty EdOrg claims E2E scenario verifies a valid People relationship plan returns an empty page and totalCount 0.
A focused through-responsibility Student GET-many scenario is added if no existing scenario can be safely retagged without relying on People CRUD setup.
Contact E2E is added only if setup can avoid People CRUD authorization; otherwise Contact remains covered at PostgreSQL and SQL Server integration level for DMS-1095.
steps-to-verify: Run pwsh ./teardown-local-dms.ps1 from src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E.
Run pwsh ./setup-local-dms.ps1 -EnvironmentFile ./.env.e2e.relational from src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E.

Verify docker inspect dms-local-dms-1 --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' | rg 'UseRelationalBackend|Datastore|QueryHandler' includes AppSettings__UseRelationalBackend=true, AppSettings__Datastore=postgresql, and AppSettings__QueryHandler=postgresql.
Run env -u NODE_OPTIONS dotnet test EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E.csproj --configuration Release --filter "Category=relational-backend" from src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E.

description: Run focused formatting and verification for the DMS-1095 implementation scope after code and tests are updated.
acceptance-criteria: Changed C# files are formatted with csharpier.
Backend plan unit tests pass.
Backend repository unit tests pass for DMS-1095 query authorization coverage.
PostgreSQL integration tests for People relationship GET-many pass.
SQL Server integration tests for People relationship GET-many pass when ConnectionStrings__MssqlAdmin is configured.
Relational-backend E2E tests for retagged or newly added DMS-1095 scenarios pass against a relational dms-local stack.
steps-to-verify: Run dotnet csharpier format src/dms/backend src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E
Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj
Run dotnet test src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RelationalDocumentStoreRepository"
Run dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.Integration.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Relationship"
Run env -u NODE_OPTIONS dotnet test src/dms/tests/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E/EdFi.DataManagementService.Tests.E2E.csproj --configuration Release --filter "Category=relational-backend"
